metadata.title: Obsession
metadata.lyrics:
[00:41.15] You are an obsession (you are an obsession)
[00:43.96] I cannot sleep (I cannot sleep)
[00:45.52] I am a possession (I am your possession)
[00:47.99] Unopened at your feet
[00:49.93] There's no balance (there is no balance)
[00:52.35] No equality (no equality)
[00:54.24] Be still, I will not accept defeat (be still, I will not accept defeat)
[00:58.38] I will have you, yes, I will have you
[01:02.53] I will find a way, and I will have you
[01:06.52] Like a butterfly, a wild butterfly
[01:10.54] I will collect you and capture you
[01:14.80] You are an obsession, you're my obsession
[01:18.89] Who do you want me to be to make you sleep with me?
[01:23.27] You are an obsession, you're my obsession
[01:27.22] Who do you want me to be to make you sleep with me?
[01:31.83] I feed you, I drink you by day and by night
[01:35.82] I need you, I need you by sun and candlelight
[01:40.81] You protest, you want to be
[01:44.59] Safe, oh, there's no alternative (there's no alternative)
[01:48.01] Your face appears again, I see the future there
[01:52.33] But I see danger, stranger beware
[01:57.17] Of circumstance in your naked dreams
[02:00.95] Your affection is not what it seems
[02:04.92] You are an obsession, you're my obsession
[02:09.02] Who do you want me to be to make you sleep with me?
[02:13.38] You are an obsession, you're my obsession
[02:17.39] Who do you want me to be to make you sleep with me?
[02:23.20] 
[02:55.60] My fantasy has turned to madness (has turned to madness)
[02:59.23] And all my goodness (and all my goodness)
[03:01.36] Has turned to badness (has turned to badness)
[03:04.36] My need to possess you has consumed my soul
[03:08.69] My life is trembling, I have no control
[03:12.12] I will have you, yes, I will have you
[03:16.48] I will find a way, and I will have you
[03:20.38] Like a butterfly, a wild butterfly
[03:24.46] I will collect you and capture you
[03:28.43] You are an obsession, you're my obsession
[03:32.73] Who do you want me to be to make you sleep with me?
[03:36.94] You are an obsession, you're my obsession
[03:40.97] Who do you want me to be to make you sleep with me?
[03:45.15] You are an obsession, you're my obsession
[03:49.49] Who do you want me to be to make you sleep with me?
[03:53.78] You are an obsession, you're my obsession
[03:57.93] Who do you want me to be to make you sleep with me?
[04:01.96] You are an obsession
[04:05.33] 
[04:18.50] You are an obsession, you're my obsession
[04:21.67]
